Description.value: Semantic play-event logger. Writes NDJSON session logs to %APPDATA%/7DaysToDie/WakaLog/ for downstream LLM consumption (chill-assistant). MVP scope (22 events): combat (kill_basic/special, boss_kill, player_death, weapon/armor_broken, critical_hp, buff_acquired, infection_progressed), quest (accepted/completed/failed/cancelled, scourge_beacon_started/cleared, trader_tier_up, trader_high_value_trade), movement (poi_first_visit, biome_crossed, fast_travel_used, session_distance_summary, day_started), meta (session_start/end). Subscribe-and-write only; no aggregation. Requires HarmonyX (0_TFP_Harmony). EAC must be off.
